tasks.subject: T1: Aggregator types + pure functions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure aggregator + types.

**Files:** crawler/src/timing/types.ts, crawler/src/timing/aggregator.ts, crawler/src/tests/test_timing_aggregator.ts

**Verify:** npx tsx src/tests/test_timing_aggregator.ts

```json:metadata
{"files":["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/timing/types.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/timing/aggregator.ts","apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/test_timing_aggregator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsx src/tests/test_timing_aggregator.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["createAggregator clean state","Empty input well-formed summary","Median/p95/p99 math","share sums to 100","detect_saturated_pct math","crawlee_throttle_pct math"]}
```
